## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website SEO strategies and content optimization for Firework's video commerce playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating content around the "State of Video Commerce 2025" playbook to drive traffic and leads](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Implement dynamic blog categorization to improve lead magnet relevance and effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Explore adding pop-ups on blog posts to increase lead magnet conversions](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Address issues with UTM tracking for better attribution of blog traffic to demos/conversions](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

## Topics

### Video Commerce Playbook Content Strategy

  - [Prioritize content creation around "State of Video Commerce 2025" playbook](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Prateek to analyze report and suggest 20-25 article topics based on search volume and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Focus on high-impact data points (e.g., 5x conversion lift with showroom videos, video-powered landing page performance)](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Aim to drive more traffic to the playbook download page within the week](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Blog Categorization and Lead Magnets

  - [Current issue: 90% of blogs categorized as "industry insights," limiting lead magnet diversity](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Cameron working on automating blog recategorization process](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Plan to add new categories specific to customer industries (e.g., beauty, CPG, home appliances)](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Short-term solution: Manually update categories for top 20-40 most trafficked blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Long-term goal: Create a spreadsheet with suggested new categories for all 650 blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Conversion Optimization Strategies

  - [Implement pop-ups on blog posts (appearing after 15-30 seconds) to promote lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Add images to lead magnet banners to potentially increase conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Investigate UTM parameter issues for accurate tracking of blog traffic to demo/conversion pages](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Analyze engagement time on gated content pages vs. regular blog posts to assess effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### ICP Targeting Update

  - [New ICP targeting software implemented, showing improved data collection compared to previous solution](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Further details to be discussed with Yi Jin](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to analyze "State of Video Commerce 2025" playbook and suggest article topics by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Cameron to continue work on blog recategorization automation and provide an update by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Cameron to implement blog pop-ups for lead magnets by Thursday's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Investigate and fix UTM parameter tracking issues for accurate attribution](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Prateek and Cameron to collaborate on manual update of top 20-40 blog post categories once data is available](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Continue monitoring lead magnet performance and blog-to-demo conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/RooNnxhx1YpqnBsPEfheA4xkvH1sJ1fp?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
